top_posts.text: KubeCon attendees bemoaning the lack of spicy food in Amsterdam: get the vindaloo at Amantra. You can thank me later

Big news @ #securitycon #KubeCon EU — Canonical, publishers of Ubuntu, have joined the Rust Foundation as a Gold Member! Canonical's investment supports the long-term health of #rustlang and highlights its growing role in resilient systems. rustfoundation.org/media/canoni... 🦀

Really excited about my #kubecon talk - it's all about how to make your AI pipeline better with observability. But NOT about the model ... it's about the data flowing into it.

Sunday morning 5km in Amsterdam, weather was nice today for a run.

Good start before kubecon, looking forward to spend next few days with the community

Hello KubeCon! I’m speaking today on building extensible platforms and I can’t wait. And for those of you building platform shaped projects… I have a challenge for you, if you’re feeling ambitious 👀

As always, please feel free to say hi if you see me!

Sadly, I will not be at KubeCon this week. To show all my kubernaut friends just how much I miss you, I have a small gift.

If you missed out on getting a deck of Exploding Clusters cards, well now you can play online.

exploding.k8s.io

Go easy on me, it's just a "free time" project.

Have fun!

Kubernetes gets much easier to manage when Git becomes the source of truth for your deployments. Here, Olumoko shows you how to implement GitOps on Kubernetes with Argo CD + GitHub Actions. You'll learn how to automate stuff, deploy manifests from Git, & more.
www.freecodecamp.org/news/how-to-...

about to fly to amsterdam for kubecon, first time out of north america 

gonna be hosteling around europe for a month after like the teenager i refuse to admit i'm not 

wish me luck!

KubeCon EU 2026 starts tomorrow! Badge pickup is open today from 8:00–18:00 CET at Entrance C & Entrance K. Plan your week, explore the sessions, and get ready for an amazing KubeCon experience. events.linuxfoundation.org/kubecon-clou...

Career update: I’m founding engineer for a k8s native cluster orchestration team to expand ml workload scheduling options. 😭🙏❤️

(starting off with Kueue, duh 😜) 
Ready for the challenge!

Kicking off #KubeCon week with @rejekts.io! @joshleecreates.bsky.social  and I were back on stage together, delivering our #OpenTelemetry vendor neutrality talk. 

As always, Rejekts was awesome. So nice to see old friends and to meet new ones!!

I cried. I laughed.
Monkigras (resilience theme, every talk hit). Paris with @betty now headed to KubeCon EU. FluxCon, KubeAuto Day, & a women's panel Wednesday at the AWS booth I'm really looking forward to.
It's been a hard season. This  community is why I'm here.

Any advice for a fourth-timer who is on their own for the first time?
Bureaucratic nonsense meant that I'll have to figure out how to conference on my own this year.

記事の要約: AWS（Amazon Web Services）は創立20周年を迎え、240以上のクラウドサービスを提供し続けています。毎年何百万もの顧客に対して新機能をリリースし、ブログには4,700件以上の記事が公開されています。創立当初からのイノベーションのペースは変わらず、特に顧客の重要な課題に対処するソリューションの再考が強調されています。過去10年間の中で、特に注目すべきAWSのローンチやブログも紹介され、コンテナのデプロイやKubernetesサービスの導入など、技術の進化が語られています。

What do  you think influences the growth of the product you are building more…

1) feedback of your users 
2) price
3).showing your face in a social media post 
4) missing out #KubeCon

tell me what you think and then head over to nexus-share.com and create your account 🙃🫶

#BuildInPublic

recent_posts.text: And they're greeting us with a full live-demo-based talk! Serving 2 versions of a story: one bland, one in Douglas Adam style. And getting people to vote for it, collecting insights from these votes through OpenTelemetry, and changing versions with feature flagging.

First talk of this #KubeCon + #CloudNativeCon co-located events: @whitneylee.com and @thomasvitale.com about rollouts based on user feedback, which is especially meaningful in the GenAI world where there is no "good" or "bad" statuses anymore, given the non-deterministic nature

See you in Amsterdam for KubeCon EU! 🌷

We’re showcasing the future of AI connectivity and its place in the K8s ecosystem. Whether it’s service mesh or AI-driven scaling, let’s chat about what’s next. 🚀

📍 Find the Kong team at Booth 960!

#KubeCon #Kubernetes #AI #CloudNative
AI Runway  #AKSDay #KubeCon #AKS

how to expand your ability with ai:

understand cloud infrastructure and underlying protocols
(s3 buckets, APIs, GIT, CDNs)

have various exposure to programming languages and concepts
(ie, haskell & lint vs python vs C)

exposure to linux/docker/kubernetes

understanding structured prompts
From Prompt to Response  #AKSDay #KubeCon #AKS
Trivy 0.69.4-0.69.6にマルウェアが混入、Docker Hub経由で感染。情報窃取、ワーム、Kubernetesワイパーの拡散を招く。

Around at #KubeCon from today, if you see me, feel free to say hi!

Second session of the day at #KubeCon EU. @hrittikhere.bsky.social and Kunal Das as from CastAI on automating FinOps through Argo Workflows. Teams reduced waste by 45% with these patterns.

1:35 PM CET, G102-103.

#CloudNativeCon

Here we go for my favorite time of the year: the #KubeCon + #CloudNativeCon Europe, in Amsterdam again!

Can't wait for all the great talks, cool tech discussions, interesting platform coffees, random meetings of past year's attendees, and just leaning overall ♥

Thanks @payfiteng.bsky.social !
Come to the gateway api maintainer talk tomorrow 11:15 in amtrium 1. If you've migrated of ingress-nginx, I have a sticker for you. #Kubecon
There is nothing more Frankfurt than landing at far Z68 and needing to connect to gate A2. See you soon, Amsterdam! #kubecon

On my way to #KubeCon!

Any advice for a fourth-timer who is on their own for the first time?
Bureaucratic nonsense meant that I'll have to figure out how to conference on my own this year.
Physical hardware is cool again! Metal3 just hit CNCF incubation. Ready to treat your servers like code? #Metal3 #Kubernetes
